tips: For receipt/expense booking to a department: use create_voucher with postings. Debit the expense account (from receipt type, e.g. 6300 office supplies, 6500 consumables, 6800 IT equipment), credit bank/cash (1920). Include department on the expense posting via create_accounting_dimension or by adding department context in the description. For creating departments: use create_department. Do NOT use /incomingInvoice or /supplierInvoice for receipt bookings — use create_voucher.
